en.value:
Programme structure highlighted here corresponds with the newly extended CPAP (2011-2012)
1.1  Technical Support, Guidance & Coordination for taking Child  Friendly Local Governance (CFLG), SM forward
1.2  CFLG Expansion in  DACAW (Decentralized Action for Women and Children) districts
1.3  Capacity Building on CFLG/Block Grant/Child Right Issues/Children & Young People Participation (CYP)
1.4  Knowledge Management
1.5  Innovations (Development of CFLG participatory Monitoring tools, Develop pictorial flipchart/IEC mat
1.6  Monitoring and Supervision

snapshot.implementing_agency: Ministry of Women, Children and Senior Citizens, Chitwan District Development Committee, Jajarkot District Development Committee, Kaski District Development Committee, Mugu District Development Committee, Kapilvastu District Development Committee, Parsa District Development Committee, Sunsari District Development Committee, Association of District Development Committee Nepal, Bajhang District Development Committee, Jumla District Development Committee, Panchthar District Development Committee, Dang District Development Committee, Dolpa District Development Committee, Bajura District Development Committee, Saptari District Development Committee, Kalikot District Development Committee, Tanahun District Development Committee, Kavrepalanchowk District Development Committee, Humla District Development Committee, Accham District Development Committee, Rukum District Development Committee, Nawalparasi District Development Committee, Village Development Resource Center, Udayapur District Development Committee, Dadeldhura District Development Committee, Ministry of Federal Affairs & General Administration

en.full: Programme Component Result: PCR5, Intermediate Results: IR 1 - Local Governance
